title: Vanilla-Plus
description: smooth rework of vanilla textures, with focus on tools, “standard survival” items, particles and more
body:
The tools in Vanilla-Plus have been slightly redesigned to make them more functional and aesthetically pleasing. 
more appealing. Tools like picks, shovels, and axes are now more recognizable while still fitting well with the vanilla style.

The game's user interface (GUI) has been slightly adjusted for a clearer and cleaner look.
Menus, inventories and displays have been made more user-friendly without compromising the original charm.

Vanilla-Plus remains minimalistic, focusing on small but meaningful changes.
The texture pack strives to optimize aesthetics and usability without cluttering the game.

If you're looking for a texture pack that slightly reworks tools, the GUI and some items in Minecraft to make the game more comfortable, 
without compromising the vanilla style, Vanilla-Plus is the perfect choice for you. It provides a pleasant and clear gaming experience without changing the original Minecraft feel.
